package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_depends_on_gin_or_http: Repository packages that import Gin, `net/http`, or transport-only response helpers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule126NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule126NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule126NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario126Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule126NegativeService, input Rule126NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
